name: Luma
description: Luma (lu.ma) event management platform. Create and manage events, guest lists, registrations, and event analytics.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Api Key
credential_fields.description: Luma API key (generate from your Luma dashboard under Settings > API)

tools.name: find_events
tools.description: List all events managed by your Luma calendar. Returns event details including name, date, location, and registration info. Supports pagination via cursor-based navigation with after parameter.

after.description: Pagination cursor. Pass the value from the previous response's next_cursor field to get the next page of results.

period.description: Filter events by time period. 'future' returns upcoming events, 'past' returns past events, 'all' returns everything. Defaults to 'future'.

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create a new event on your Luma calendar. Specify the event name, start/end times, timezone, and other details. The event will be associated with the calendar linked to your API key.

start_at.description: Event start time in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2025-06-15T18:00:00Z).

end_at.description: Event end time in ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2025-06-15T21:00:00Z).

timezone.description: Timezone for the event in IANA format (e.g. 'America/New_York', 'Europe/London'). Defaults to UTC.

require_rsvp_approval.description: Whether RSVPs require manual approval. Defaults to false.

place_id.description: Google Places ID for the location.

meeting_url.description: Virtual meeting URL (Zoom, Google Meet, etc.) for online events.

tools.name: update_event
tools.description: Update an existing event on Luma. Pass the event's api_id and any fields to update. Only provided fields will be changed; omitted fields remain unchanged.

event_api_id.description: The unique API ID of the event to update (returned when creating or listing events).

start_at.description: Updated start time in ISO 8601 format.

end_at.description: Updated end time in ISO 8601 format.

geo_address_json.description: Updated location object with address details.

description.description: Updated event description in markdown format.

tools.name: add_guest
tools.description: Add a guest to a Luma event. The guest will be registered with 'Going' status. Provide the event API ID and guest email. Optionally include guest name and other details.

event_api_id.description: The unique API ID of the event to add the guest to.

guests.description: Array of guest objects to add to the event.

tools.name: update_guest
tools.description: Update a guest's status for a Luma event. Use this to approve, decline, or check in guests. Provide the event API ID and guest email along with the new status.

event_api_id.description: The unique API ID of the event.

email.description: Guest's email address to identify the guest to update.

guest_api_id.description: Alternative to email: the guest's unique API ID (starts with 'g-').

status.description: The new status to set for the guest.
